name: endtoend_three_messages
description: Sequence of 3 messages across SATA client group and All-Staff group covering dispatch → delivery → invoice. Tests that multiple incremental calls accumulate state correctly and cadence nodes activate at the right points.
pass_criteria: All three reactive nodes updated; delivery_photo_check activated after dispatch; payment_followup_30d remains pending (delivery just confirmed, 30 days not elapsed)
notes: Run as 3 sequential update agent calls, each building on the previous node states. Final state is compared against expected_final_state.
